backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining contact form submission and product detail management with CRUD operations, including filtering products by category and storing data in persistent collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a watermark opacity styling change in frontend/src/index.css to make it darker and more visible.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, styling, components, pages, and backend integration hooks for the FarmSiddhi application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base layer defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with custom radius and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router configuration for eight routes, QueryClient provider, InternetIdentity provider, shared layout with Navigation/Footer, fixed watermark background, and Toaster component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying FarmSiddhi logo, contact information, social media links, copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile menu for seven routes including Admin, and active route highlighting using primary colors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning anonymous or authenticated actor and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API interactions including contact form submissions, product details retrieval, and category-based product filtering using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, typography, and utility classes including section containers, padding, and watermark background styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: About page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in card layouts with icons, plus additional content explaining the platform's value proposition.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all contact form submissions in a table with user type badges, loading states, and error handling using useGetAllContactForms hook.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page with a form for submitting inquiries (name, email, phone, message, user type) and a sidebar displaying contact information cards with icons.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays export services page with quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade support, and compliance services. Includes a certifications section showcasing international standards.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Presents farmer network page highlighting direct procurement, fair pricing, aggregation platform, quality standardization, and supply chain digitization. Features a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main landing page with hero section, services overview (aggregation, quality control, processing, packaging, logistics), and product showcase linking to individual product pages.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Dynamic product detail page that fetches products by category ID from URL params, displays product information with image, and handles loading/error states with debug logging.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Product catalog page displaying grid of agricultural products (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed foods, makhana) with images, descriptions, and varieties, linking to individual product detail pages.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme with container settings, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting FarmSiddhi corporate website with 6 main pages (Home, About, Products, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact), silver green/brown color scheme, B2B export focus, and known issues with product detail pages not displaying properly and deployment errors.
